blocks.text: Tromsø lead Eliteserien after defeating a still-winless Brann on Sunday. In La Liga, Real Madrid edged city rivals Atlético 3-2 in a controversial derby — six points clear at the top.
🏎️ Fri 03:30 — Japanese GP at Suzuka — 2026 championship battle on the classic circuit
